description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the zauster/r-rcpparmadillo:latest Docker image and three stages: build, check, and test. In the build stage add a buildbinary job that runs Rscript -e 'devtools::build(binary = TRUE)'. In the check stage add a checkpackage job that runs Rscript -e 'devtools::check(document = TRUE, args = "--no-tests")'. In the test stage add an unittests job that runs R CMD build . --no-build-vignettes --no-manual, sets PKG_FILE_NAME=$(ls -1t *.tar.gz | head -n 1), runs R CMD check "${PKG_FILE_NAME}" --no-build-vignettes --no-manual --as-cran, then executes Rscript -e 'devtools::test()', Rscript -e 'devtools::install_dev_deps()', and Rscript -e 'covr::codecov()' using the CODECOV_TOKEN variable. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
